task_completion.description: Open the raw telco customer churn CSV data in WPS Spreadsheet
task_completion.visual_evidence: WPS Spreadsheet application is open displaying the raw customer churn data with columns like MonthlyCharges and Churn.
A sheet named 'Data' is visible. Column V has the header 'Lost_MRR' and contains values corresponding to MonthlyCharges for churned customers.
Column W has the header 'High_Value_Churn' and contains indicators (e.g., TRUE/FALSE, Yes/No, 1/0) for churned customers with MonthlyCharges over 80.

task_completion.description: Create 'Dashboard' sheet with summary tables for Contract Type and Internet Service
task_completion.visual_evidence: A sheet named 'Dashboard' is active. It contains tables grouping data by Contract Type (Month-to-month, One year, Two year) and Internet Service (DSL, Fiber optic, No), with columns for Total Customers, Churned Customers, Churn Rate, and Total Lost MRR.

task_completion.description: Include overall KPIs in the Dashboard
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Dashboard' sheet displays specific standalone KPI values for Overall Churn Rate, Total Lost MRR, Avg Tenure (for churned customers), and High Value Churned Count.

task_completion.description: Format rates as percentages and MRR as currency
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Dashboard, Churn Rate cells display with a '%' sign, and Total Lost MRR cells display with a currency symbol (e.g., '$').
The WPS Spreadsheet window title bar or a save dialog shows the file name 'churn_analysis.xlsx'.

integrity.description: The agent used the WPS Spreadsheet GUI to perform the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the WPS Spreadsheet interface (ribbon, cells, sheet tabs) rather than a terminal running a Python/Pandas script to generate the file.

integrity.description: The agent used spreadsheet formulas rather than hardcoding calculated values
integrity.visual_evidence: The formula bar in WPS Spreadsheet shows actual formulas (e.g., IF, COUNTIF, SUMIFS, AVERAGEIF) when a calculated cell is selected, rather than static numbers.

integrity.description: The agent worked with the full dataset rather than a mocked subset
integrity.visual_evidence: Row numbers in the 'Data' sheet indicate thousands of rows (the Telco dataset has ~7000 rows), and the dashboard aggregations reflect large numbers.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is '/home/ga/Documents/churn_analysis.xlsx'. The workbook must contain exactly two sheets named 'Data' and 'Dashboard'. The 'Data' sheet must include the columns 'Lost_MRR' and 'High_Value_Churn'. The agent is expected to use formulas such as 'IF', 'COUNTIF', 'SUMIFS', and 'AVERAGEIF' to compute the dashboard metrics.
